title: Escape From the Chateau
description: On pages 16–20, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Capone Bege, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Big Mom, Big Mom Pirates as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Here, yer heart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You're free to go.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: SPRO- ING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: should have just crushed it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My Heaaaa- Arrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrritt! My heart's back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seriously, though, I have no idea what just happened!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now I never have to see your sorry faces again! Later, idiots! And farewell, you dumb HAG!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Father... It looks like...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They were all saved, somehow- rero!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: See you never!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: The castle's turned into cake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's Steven's power, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That guy was a mystery to the end. I have a feeling he'd be pretty strong in a fight, too...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I guess they weren't all killed, but their castle's in pieces! I feel a bit better now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay, so all that's left is to run, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: OII II!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's what it's been since the beginning... it's just that the first bit of running was way harder than it needed to be!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you lot should hurry, too. They'll be after us in no time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've got a day's journey ahead of you once you make it to your ship. That's how long it'll take to get out of her territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You're Right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Godsfeed, gentlemen!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Castle tank!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Quit it with the stupid gags!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Shut up! That's for our survival!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Father! At least let us say goodbye!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I became pretty close with Nami, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Don't get all chummy with them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The real escape starts now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Okay, we'll go get the shark submerge

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And take it back to the sunny!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Okay! Be careful!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We gotta get going, too! Off to that coast we first landed on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: form up two squads, Daifuku.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll split into two groups and pursue them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One party will be after straw hat's head!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the rest of you, bring back Bege's!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: RAA AAAA Argh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama, don't worry! We won't let a single one of them get...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Cake... We selected the ingredients so carefully...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: The best wedding cake ever...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I wanted to eat it so badly...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Mama?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: These symptoms are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: NEW7. You know,--in—

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 45 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
